content: Explore RCA flow, transfer endpoints, technician analytics, WO modal + RcaForm frontend
AI1 backend: POST /work-orders/{id}/rca-reject (admin, reason required) + timeline + notification
AI1 frontend: Reject button + reason in admin RCA review; rejected banner + prefilled resubmission for tech
AI2 backend: breakdown_types aggregation (count + downtime) in analytics kpis
AI2 frontend: Breakdown Type pie card with Count/Downtime toggle
AI3 backend: extend technician analytics (rca_completed, per-metric ranks, overall composite)
AI3 frontend: Leaderboard with metric tabs + Overall, technician drill-down card (admin only)
AI4 backend: IN_PROGRESS transfer requires pass_on_note; handoffs array; timeline; integrity checks
AI4 frontend: Pass-On Note field on transfer of in-progress WO; handoff history display
